title: Custom service (SysEntryPointAttribute + AxService + AxServiceGroup exposed under /api/services)
instruction: In the sandbox model, expose a custom service that returns the Subject of a ConDemoNoteHeader by its NoteId. Create: (1) a request DataContract class DemoNoteLookupRequest with a parm method NoteId decorated [DataMemberAttribute]; (2) a response DataContract class DemoNoteLookupResponse with a parm method Subject decorated [DataMemberAttribute]; (3) a service class DemoNoteLookupService with a public method lookup(DemoNoteLookupRequest _request) returning DemoNoteLookupResponse, decorated [SysEntryPointAttribute(true)], that selects ConDemoNoteHeader by NoteId and fills the response; (4) an AxService DemoNoteService bound to class DemoNoteLookupService exposing the lookup operation; (5) an AxServiceGroup DemoNoteServiceGroup containing DemoNoteService so it is auto-published under /api/services. Use get_knowledge(topic="custom services") to ground the SysEntryPointAttribute + service-group pattern. All objects must build clean.
